• Running touch /tmp/codex-gate-probe.txt && echo WROTE

 
  Would you like to run the following command?
 
  Environment: local
 
  Reason: Do you want to allow writing /tmp/codex-gate-probe.txt outside the read-only sandbox?
 
  $ touch /tmp/codex-gate-probe.txt && echo WROTE
 
› 1. Yes, proceed (y)
  2. Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `touch /tmp/codex-gate-probe.txt` (p)
  3. No, and tell Codex what to do differently (esc)
 
  Press enter to confirm or esc to cancel
